title: AI Sidekick

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to remove the newly added “AI Sidekick” button, without completely disabling AI across the account?

The button is lagging and is slightly irritating - seems like a mildly pointless feature right now (For me!), and I don’t need extra clutter on my boards.

However, it seems the only way to remove this button is to disable AI, which removes the AI automation recipes.

Cheers

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml: Ignore this, disabling and re-enabling the AI features seems to have removed this button!
